title: Summarize Deployment Log
description:
Each line is `service_name SUCCESS|FAILED`. Return a summary with four lines:

```
total N
succeeded N
failed N
failed_services svc1,svc2
```

`failed_services` lists failed service names sorted alphabetically and comma-separated (empty string after the key if none failed).
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
auth-service SUCCESS
api-gateway FAILED
payment-service SUCCESS
notif-service FAILED
examples.explanation: See test case: Mixed successes and failures

test_cases.input:
auth-service SUCCESS
api-gateway FAILED
payment-service SUCCESS
notif-service FAILED
